Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}School's barely started and there's already been a student who dropped out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}She only had two years left... What'll she do if she doesn't even graduate from high school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Kind of a waste, don't you think? You only get to be a high schooler once in your life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}But it's her life, not mine. Not like it matters to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard that student who dropped out stays at home all the time now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}If she'd at least kept her name in the school roster, she might have been able to graduate...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}But if she's quitting now, it probably means she had problems during her first year too, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}And hey, it's her life. Not like it's any of my business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard Sanada-senpai was hospitalized...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I hope he's okay. I wonder if he got hurt during boxing practice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I bet he got in a fight! Some real fisticuffs![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I wish I could've seen it! I love watching martial arts![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard someone was attacked on the streets here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}They say the victim's injuries weren't too serious, but it's still pretty scary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}So they were just attacked? Like unprovoked?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I dunno... Maybe they had it coming to them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard Sanada-senpai's been released from the hospital.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I wonder how he got hurt, anyway... No one knows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Maybe he was faking it? He was just doing it for the attention?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Nah, it couldn't be. He's already surrounded by girls all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard a girl from Class 2-E fainted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Apparently, it was Apathy Syndrome. Kinda scary, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}She'd always stay out late, right? I bet she just happened to faint at the school gates.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Apathy Syndrome is so exaggerated. She'll probably wake up soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}They said a girl in Class 2-C fainted too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}And I heard it's Apathy Syndrome again... I wonder if it's contagious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I already told you! She just happened to faint in front of the gate![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Apathy Syndrome is so over-exaggerated! They'll get better if you give them some time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Y-You know how ghost stories about the school are kinda popular right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I'm not too good with that kinda stuff, so... no talking about it, okay!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}It's not that scary. It was just like...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}If you're the last one left in the school buildings, you'll hear a creepy PA announcement...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}A sobbing old lady's voice comes from the speakers...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}And if you don't leave the school within 42 seconds...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}They'll find your corpse covered in bright red blood! That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I told you not to talk about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}But if that story's true, wouldn't someone have to die like almost every day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I mean, someone's gotta be the last one left, right? They can't all get out in 42 seconds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard those people who fainted woke up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}So... I guess that means they didn't have Apathy Syndrome...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}See? Just like I said. They were probably just sleep deprived from hanging out till late.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Can't be Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}My friend said that this guy disappeared from a town nearby...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}He might be a victim of that revenge website![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Oh, a revenge website, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Wait, what's that? That sounds super bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard some students from this school are getting Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}This time, it's couples that were dating... It's so weird. I hope we'll be okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Psh, couples suddenly collapsing together? That's so typical.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}...Wait, that's not typical at all! And it's happening repeatedly? Holy crap...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}The couples-only Apathy Syndrome that's been going around... I heard it was the work of ghosts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}They say that a couple committed double suicide a long time ago and now they're infecting couples with Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I don't know about that, but if it's true, I wish I could ask them why they're doing that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I mean, they're dead! They shouldn't bother living couples.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard from my friend that there are going to be cafés and stuff at the culture festival.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}My club doesn't do that kinda stuff... It looks fun, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Those cafés and booths are so cliché.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}That's so dull... They need to have some kind of twist to them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}*sigh* I hope someone comes up with a crazy idea...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard there's a typhoon coming.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}It's a big, slow one... That means there's going to be a lot of damage, huh? This is going to suck...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}You think so? I actually want it to come sooner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}They'll probably let us out from school early, or they might even close the school. That'd be great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard that, instead of postponing the culture festival, they canceled it entirely.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}My class wasn't going to do anything special, but... I really wanted to see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Yeah, that's some bull! I mean, I did say I wanted the typhoon to come sooner, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Why'd it have to come during the culture festival!? Read the room, typhoon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard about that Aragaki guy who died the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}You know that place where all the thugs hang out? I heard they were all scared of him there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Yeah, I'm not surprised he was that kind of guy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}This might be a bit insensitive, but you're probably not living a normal life if you get killed like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard that Moriyama-san from Class 2-E is going to transfer out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Her father's sick, right? She didn't seem sad or anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Now that I think about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Even when she was acting all hyped and stuff, she didn't seem like she was really having fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I guess she has her own problems to deal with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Kirijo-senpai's father died from an illness, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}It's not like I've ever met him, but... it's kinda shocking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I think people are overblowing the whole thing. I guess he's a famous person and all, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I kinda feel bad for her, y'know? She's getting all this unwanted attention now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard Mochizuki-kun from Class 2-F's parents are overseas for work or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}He's rich and he's hot... unlike my boyfriend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Oh yeah? I see Mochizuki-kun's the new hot real estate, then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}But I hear he's asking out every girl. I'm not really interested if he's not serious about relationships.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Career experience was sooo boring... Just the same stuff over and over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I should've just ditched. Even just being in class like usual would've been more worth my time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I know, right? And I already have a part-time job...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}So it's not like I needed to learn what having a job is like. They just made us work for free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Every year, when Christmas gets close, you see more couples, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Well, I was the same way last Christmas, so I'm not really one to talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}At least you guys are still going strong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I have to find a new guy already...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Every magazine now is like, "Top 10 Best Night Views." I wanna enjoy those with someone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}Y'know, there's a lot more of those Apathy Syndrome people lately and everything's weird...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}But Christmas was super amazing! It was so pretty at Paulownia Mall, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Huh? You went there?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Weren't you going on about eating dinner at a fancy restaurant this year?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Then again, I guess that's still better than me, who ended up spending it alone... *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}All I read about in the magazines now is that cult stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I guess the members of those things take them seriously...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}It's just disturbing, seeing them popping up everywhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Seriously. TV, Internet, everywhere... All I hear is cult, cult, cult.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}My friend's friend is all into that cult stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I heard he drew a creepy symbol in his room, and his whole family's worried about him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I haven't heard a single good thing about that cult. And I hate it when they talk to me on the streets.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}"Believe in Nyx and be saved!" Get that stuff out of my face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Do I look like I need saving? Wait... Is it because I don't have a boyfriend...?[n]{f 1 1}
